description:
Boost hotfix bundle 21

Breal Morphe patch source.

Use this as a Morphe patch source only. Clean APKs must be supplied separately:
- Boost for Reddit: 1.12.12
- Imgur: 7.33.0.0

Boost fixes:
- v.redd.it download/share audio
- faster Giphy loading
- inline Giphy previews in comments
- inline previews for direct GIF links
- preview layout handling
- completed download notifications

Imgur compatibility is also included in this source.
